_description: HAPPY PATH — routine patch bump, clean release notes, safe package. Expected: APPROVE.
release_notes:
# requests 2.31.1

## Bugfixes

- Fixed an edge case where urllib3 connection pooling could raise a spurious ConnectionError
  on keep-alive connections under high load. (#6723)
- Corrected a regression introduced in 2.31.0 where response.encoding was not correctly
  detected for responses with a BOM. (#6718)

## No breaking changes. Backward compatible with 2.31.0.

See full changelog: https://github.com/psf/requests/blob/main/HISTORY.md
